heading: Conflicts of interest
label: 9054 Conflicts of interest
notes: References in TextThis part, referred to in subsec. (b), was in the original “this subtitle”, meaning subtitle A (§§ 4001–4029) of title IV of div. A of , known as the Coronavirus Economic Stabilization Act of 2020, which is classified principally to this part. For complete classification of subtitle A to the Code, see , set out as a Short Title note under , and Tables.Pub. L. 116–136section 4001 of Pub. L. 116–136section 9001 of this title

children.heading: Controlling interest
children.label: 1 Controlling interest
children.text: The term “controlling interest” means owning, controlling, or holding not less than 20 percent, by vote or value, of the outstanding amount of any class of equity interest in an entity.

children.heading: Covered entity
children.label: 2 Covered entity
children.text: The term “covered entity” means an entity in which a covered individual directly or indirectly holds a controlling interest. For the purpose of determining whether an entity is a covered entity, the securities owned, controlled, or held by 2 or more individuals who are related as described in paragraph (3)(B) shall be aggregated.

children.label: A
children.text: the President, the Vice President, the head of an Executive department, or a Member of Congress; and

children.label: B
children.text: the spouse, child, son-in-law, or daughter-in-law, as determined under applicable common law, of an individual described in subparagraph (A).

children.heading: Executive department
children.label: 4 Executive department
children.text: The term “Executive department” has the meaning given the term in .section 101 of title 5

children.heading: Member of Congress
children.label: 5 Member of Congress
children.text: The term “member of Congress” means a member of the Senate or House of Representatives, a Delegate to the House of Representatives, and the Resident Commissioner from Puerto Rico.

children.label: ii
children.text: classified as stock or anything similar;

children.label: B
children.text: a capital or profit interest in a limited liability company or partnership; or

children.label: C
children.text: a warrant or right, other than a right to convert, to purchase, sell, or subscribe to a share or interest described in subparagraph (A) or (B), respectively.

children.heading: Prohibition
children.label: b Prohibition
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this part, no covered entity may be eligible for any transaction described in .section 9042 of this title

children.heading: Requirement
children.label: c Requirement
children.text: The principal executive officer and the principal financial officer, or individuals performing similar functions, of an entity seeking to enter a transaction under shall, before that transaction is approved, certify to the Secretary and the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System that the entity is eligible to engage in that transaction, including that the entity is not a covered entity.section 9042 of this title
